Unit 14 Waena Inn - Maui Private Suite

    Apartment·5 guests·1 bedroom·1 bathroom
4.85·1 review

Enjoy a cozy and modern 324 sq ft Ohana studio at Waena Inn , perfectly designed for a relaxing Maui getaway. This charming space features a small kitchenette and a private bathroom, ideal for creating your own island-style meals. Large windows fill the room with natural light and offer breathtaking...
